title: Best of Oudtshoorn Readers' Choice Awards
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The wait is over, and we...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The wait is over, and we are thrilled to introduce the very first annual Best of Oudtshoorn Readers’ Choice Awards.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The wait is over, and we are thrilled to introduce the very first annual Best of Oudtshoorn Readers’ Choice Awards."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Following the roaring success of our sister publication’s Best of George project in 2023, it is now Oudtshoorn's time to shine and you, our loyal readers, have nominated your favourite businesses in and around this beautiful Klein Karoo town.","html":"Following the roaring success of our sister publication’s Best of George project in 2023, it is now Oudtshoorn's time to shine and you, our loyal readers, have nominated your favourite businesses in and around this beautiful Klein Karoo town."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Best of Oudtshoorn aims to celebrate the very best of our region, from shopping and outdoor activities, to restaurants and professional services."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"More than 2 220 nominations for over 370 businesses were received, and a 2024 winner will be crowned in each of the 84 categories. Your nominations and keen participation clearly show that our community is all about celebrating excellence. So, let’s get voting and put the very best of Oudtshoorn in the spotlight!","html":"More than 2 220 nominations for over 370 businesses were received, and a 2024 winner will be crowned in each of the 84 categories. Your nominations and keen participation clearly show that our community is all about celebrating excellence. So, let’s get voting and put the very best of Oudtshoorn in the spotlight!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Congratulations to each 2024 nominee!","html":"Congratulations to each 2024 nominee!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Voting is now open at www.bestofoudtshoorn.com.","html":"Voting is now open at www.bestofoudtshoorn.com."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Each vote rewards companies for going the extra mile and upholding the good name of our unique town, so please be honest in your assessment and ensure that a worthy winner emerges in each category.","html":"Each vote rewards companies for going the extra mile and upholding the good name of our unique town, so please be honest in your assessment and ensure that a worthy winner emerges in each category."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Voting closes 25 July 2024.","html":"Voting closes 25 July 2024."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Best of Oudtshoorn Readers' Choice Awards
